params.name: Murder On The Train
params.description:
On Jan 1, 1934 AD, Murder on the Train was first published.
Murder On The Train is a renowned detective fiction story. It involves a murder case on a train and follows a detective's investigation of twelve suspects using complex clues to find the true killer. The book introduced a new style to detective novels, significantly influencing later literary works of the same genre.
